message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate hoisted_vars.contains() to varResolutionIsHoisted()

Migrate 12 simple hoisted_vars.contains() patterns to use the
centralized varResolutionIsHoisted() method. This continues Phase 3
of the Pass 2.5 Variable Resolution plan.

Changes:
- Replace is_hoisted = hoisted_vars.contains(x) with varResolutionIsHoisted(x)
- Replace shadows_hoisted = hoisted_vars.contains(x) patterns
- Add variable_resolution.zig to version control (Pass 2.5 implementation)

Remaining 30 hoisted_vars.contains() calls are:
- Inside isDeclared()/varResolutionIsHoisted() implementations
- Combined patterns requiring careful analysis
- pyvalue_hoisted_vars checks (separate concern)

hoisted_vars.contains() count: 42 -> 30
